arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CodeStar Connections connection.

connection_status.description: The current status of the CodeStar Connections connection.

host_arn.description: The ARN of the host associated with the connection.

id.description: The unique identifier for the CodeStar Connections connection.

name.description: The name of the CodeStar Connections connection.

provider_type.description: The type of provider used for the connection, such as GitHub or Bitbucket.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the CodeStar Connections connection.
